data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. CONCOCTION was well backed and justified the support when resuming last start over 1100m here. Was a winner at the only previous second-up run and happy to have him on top. 5. GELSEY missed the frame here last time when fourth at this track. Prior to that had been in the money on two consecutive occasions, following a CL2 win at Tamworth. Rates highly on best figures and can atone without much shock. 8. ZOUGO BOSS drifted well back when resuming last start before winding up strongly to just miss when third over 1300m at this track. Better with that run under his belt and gets a key switch in Roper. If she can utilise the low draw this time, he will prove very tough to stop. 3. SUPAIRO returns for the Archibalds and has been readied with two soft trials. Started the last campaign solidly when in the placings over 1200m at Tamworth. Expected to make his presence felt.","runners":[1,5,8,3],"exclusive":false}
